texto: Of course, of course. Mr. Buzzby, did it ever occur to you that a god may live, figuratively, a dog's life?''Eh?''Gods are transfigured, you know. They go up in smoke, as it were. In smoke and flame. They become pure flame, pure spirit, creatures with no visible body.'("A Visitor From Egypt")
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Frank Belknap Long que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “Of course, of course. Mr. Buzzby, did it ever occur to you that a god may live, figuratively, a d…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre fe, gods, transfigured, com foco em transfigured.
